title: React form change
prompt: Implement an approved React form change, validate it, review the local diff, and prepare an authorized commit.

title: Rust SQLite query
prompt: Implement a Rust SQLite query correction with migration and query-plan evidence, then review it without pushing.

title: AddrInUse diagnosis
prompt: Diagnose an address-in-use startup failure, apply only the confirmed remediation, and validate the regression seam.

title: Rust memory investigation
prompt: Measure repeated-operation memory growth, confirm the cause, apply the bounded Rust fix, and compare the same workload.

title: Worktree review
prompt: Review a dirty worktree with unrelated edits and return exact ownership labels and safe staging guidance.

title: Commit range review
prompt: Review a fixed commit range across code, tests, security, and docs and return consolidated findings.

title: Frontend architecture audit
prompt: Audit a selected frontend feature for reuse, state ownership, layout, accessibility, and performance.

title: Tokio lifecycle audit
prompt: Audit a known Tokio service for task ownership, cancellation, shutdown, and error propagation.

title: Security audit
prompt: Audit a bounded authentication and session surface and return evidence-grounded risks only.

title: Browser screenshot verification
prompt: Verify a deployed page in the built-in browser at requested viewports and retain screenshot and console evidence.

title: Tauri client verification
prompt: Launch a specified Tauri build, verify the real window and runtime source, and capture semantic-control evidence.

title: Git delivery
prompt: Deliver reviewed paths as one commit, push the current branch, and prove local and remote refs match.
